name: Keegan-Michael Key
blurb: Half of the sketch duo Key & Peele.
bio: Keegan-Michael Key is an American comedian and actor who, with Jordan Peele, created and starred in the Emmy-winning Comedy Central sketch series Key & Peele (2012-2015). He came up through Detroit's Second City and MADtv.

flags.note: Added 2026-06-17 discovery pass (expanded comedy-bit scope): minimum profile = bio + headshot + one verified clip; deepen via the audit game.
